weather.title: Weather Forecast
weather.dewHeavy: Heavy dew expected — bowling second will be harder
weather.dewModerate: Moderate dew — may affect spinners in 2nd innings
weather.dewLight: Minimal dew — conditions even for both innings

pitch.highScoring: High-scoring venue. Batting-friendly conditions with good carry and true bounce. Pacers may find some assistance early. Team batting first has historically posted 175+ here.
pitch.balanced: Balanced pitch offering something for both batsmen and bowlers. Spinners tend to play a key role in middle overs. Chasing teams have a slight edge.
pitch.lowScoring: Low-scoring venue that assists spin heavily. Slower surface makes stroke-play difficult. Bowling first and defending is the preferred strategy.

odds.notAvailableHint: Odds are usually available 1-2 days before major matches (IPL, internationals). Check back closer to match time!

aiChat.title: CricketBaazi AI
aiChat.welcomeMessage: Hey! I'm your CricketBaazi AI Analyst for IPL 2026. I can help you with match predictions, value bets, player analysis, and betting strategies. What would you like to know?

fallback.default: Maaf kijiye, the backend service is currently unavailable. I'm unable to provide real-time analysis right now. Please try again later or check the Settings page for API status.
fallback.csk: CSK are perennial IPL favorites with a strong track record at Chepauk. While I can't provide live analysis right now (backend unavailable), historically CSK have been excellent in the first half of the tournament. Dhoni ka legacy strong hai!
fallback.mi: Mumbai Indians have the most IPL titles. While I can't run live analysis (backend unavailable), MI's strength typically lies in their death bowling and finishing ability. Rohit ka captaincy bahut strong hai!
fallback.value: For value bets, I recommend looking at underdogs playing at home venues and matches where the odds market might be overreacting to recent form. Backend is currently unavailable for detailed analysis.
fallback.batsman: Top batsman markets often provide value. Look for in-form openers at batting-friendly venues like Chinnaswamy and Wankhede. Backend is currently unavailable for specific predictions.

kelly.title: Kelly Calculator
kelly.subtitle: Optimal bet sizing
kelly.noValueDesc: The odds don't offer value at this probability. The implied probability is higher than your estimated win chance.
kelly.formula: Kelly % = (bp - q) / b, where b = odds - 1, p = win probability, q = 1 - p. It tells you the optimal fraction of your bankroll to bet.
kelly.exampleText: CSK @ 1.85 odds, you think 60% chance → Kelly says bet 8.1% of bankroll. Half-Kelly (4%) is safer for most bettors.

six.name: Six
six.desc: Ball hit over the boundary without bouncing. Worth 6 runs.

four.name: Four
four.desc: Ball reaches the boundary after bouncing. Worth 4 runs.

century.name: Century
century.desc: A batter scores 100+ runs in a single innings.

halfCentury.name: Half Century
halfCentury.desc: A batter scores 50+ runs in a single innings.

duck.name: Duck
duck.desc: A batter gets out without scoring any runs.

goldenDuck.name: Golden Duck
goldenDuck.desc: A batter gets out on the very first ball faced.

strikeRate.name: Strike Rate
strikeRate.desc: Runs scored per 100 balls. SR = (Runs / Balls) x 100.

battingAverage.name: Batting Average
battingAverage.desc: Average runs per dismissal. Total runs / times out.

powerplay.name: Powerplay
powerplay.desc: First 6 overs in T20 with only 2 fielders outside 30-yard circle.

deathOvers.name: Death Overs
deathOvers.desc: Last 4 overs (17-20) of a T20 innings. Usually highest scoring.

superOver.name: Super Over
superOver.desc: Tiebreaker: each team bats 1 over when match ends in a tie.

runRate.name: Run Rate
runRate.desc: Average runs per over. Total runs / total overs bowled.

nrr.name: NRR
nrr.desc: Net Run Rate. Difference between run rate scored and conceded.

wicket.name: Wicket
wicket.desc: A batter getting out (bowled, caught, stumped, run out, LBW).

over.name: Over
over.desc: Set of 6 legal deliveries. A T20 innings has 20 overs.

maiden.name: Maiden Over
maiden.desc: An over with no runs scored off the bat. Very rare in T20.

economyRate.name: Economy Rate
economyRate.desc: Average runs conceded per over by a bowler. Lower is better.

bowlingAverage.name: Bowling Average
bowlingAverage.desc: Runs conceded per wicket taken. Lower is better.

wide.name: Wide
wide.desc: Delivery too far from batter. 1 extra run + ball rebowled.

noBall.name: No Ball
noBall.desc: Illegal delivery. 1 extra run + free hit next ball.

yorker.name: Yorker
yorker.desc: Ball pitched at the batter's feet. Key death overs delivery.

bouncer.name: Bouncer
bouncer.desc: Short ball rising towards batter's head/chest.

googly.name: Googly
googly.desc: Leg spinner's deception ball turning the opposite way.

hattrick.name: Hat-trick
hattrick.desc: Bowler takes 3 wickets on 3 consecutive deliveries.

lbw.name: LBW
lbw.desc: Leg Before Wicket. Out if ball hits pad but would have hit stumps.

caught.name: Caught
caught.desc: Batter out when fielder catches the ball before it bounces.

runOut.name: Run Out
runOut.desc: Out when stumps broken while batter is outside crease.

stumped.name: Stumped
stumped.desc: Out when keeper breaks stumps while batter out of crease.

drs.name: DRS
drs.desc: Decision Review System. Teams challenge umpire decisions.

extras.name: Extras
extras.desc: Runs not scored by batter: wides, no-balls, byes, leg-byes.

matchWinner.name: Match Winner
matchWinner.desc: Predict which team wins. Most popular betting market.

topBatsman.name: Top Batsman
topBatsman.desc: Predict who scores the most runs in the match.

topBowler.name: Top Bowler
topBowler.desc: Predict who takes the most wickets in the match.

totalRuns.name: Total Runs O/U
totalRuns.desc: Over/Under on total match runs, e.g. Over 320.5.

firstInningsScore.name: 1st Innings Score
firstInningsScore.desc: Predict total score of the team batting first.

tossWinner.name: Toss Winner
tossWinner.desc: Predict which captain wins the coin toss. 50/50 market.

manOfMatch.name: Man of the Match
manOfMatch.desc: Predict who wins the MVP award.

valueBet.name: Value Bet
valueBet.desc: Odds higher than true probability. Key to long-term profit.

accumulator.name: Accumulator
accumulator.desc: Multiple bets combined. All must win. Higher odds, higher risk.

impliedProbability.name: Implied Probability
impliedProbability.desc: Probability from odds: 1 / decimal odds x 100.
